---
title: "Orphans Home, Plymouth, The"
---

## Orphans Home, Plymouth, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This was founded by Lydia Sellon in the 1840s as part of the wide-ranging programme of her sisterhood, the Devonport Sisters of Mercy, later the Society of the Most Holy Trinity.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
